summary: The UK offers fully digital public procurement through Contracts Finder for lower-value opportunities and Find a Tender for higher-value contracts above procurement thresholds. The Government Commercial Function oversees procurement policy, and the platform supports end-to-end digital tendering, contract award notices, and supplier registration.
notes: Find a Tender replaced the EU's OJEU/TED for UK procurement after Brexit. The Procurement Act 2023 introduced further reforms to digitize and simplify public procurement. The UK publishes procurement data in the Open Contracting Data Standard (OCDS) format.
